hero.subtitle: Stop abandoning habits by week 2. Three free AI agents guide you through a science-backed 66-day journey — from intention to automaticity.

phases.title: The 66-Day Rule
phases.subtitle: Research shows it takes 66 days to form an automatic habit. We break this into 3 phases — each with AI-powered guidance.

phase1.title: Foundation
phase1.desc: Establish your routine. Create the trigger that makes it stick.

phase2.title: Active Production
phase2.desc: Intentional growth. Every session harder than the last.

phase3.title: Consolidation
phase3.desc: The habit runs itself. You become someone who just does this.

ultralearning.title: Your Journal. Real AI Feedback.
ultralearning.subtitle: Journaling as immersive practice. The AI adapts per habit type — linguistic skills get a Language Teacher, behavioral habits get a Behavioral Coach.

steps.1: Create a habit and choose your target skill (language or behavioral).
steps.2: The AI generates a 66-day plan with phases, tasks, and techniques.
steps.3: Journal daily. The right AI agent analyzes your entry and gives feedback.

habitPlanner.title: Habit Planner
habitPlanner.desc: Get a personalized 66-day plan with daily tasks, phases, and proven techniques — built in seconds.

languageTeacher.title: Language Teacher
languageTeacher.desc: Practicing English? Get grammar scores, vocabulary analysis, corrections, and daily challenges.

behavioralCoach.title: Behavioral Coach
behavioralCoach.desc: Tracks your mood, energy, consistency patterns, and gives micro-actions for tomorrow.

features.title: Everything You Need to Not Quit

cycles.title: 66-Day Cycles
cycles.desc: Every day counts. See all 66 days ahead of you.

analytics.title: Streak Analytics
analytics.desc: Watch your consistency grow. Don't break the chain.

journaling.title: Daily Journaling
journaling.desc: Write daily. Get smarter feedback than any journal app.

multilanguage.title: Multi-language
multilanguage.desc: Practice in your target language. Track it here.

freeAI.title: 100% Free AI
freeAI.desc: Zero cost forever. No credit card, no trial.

opensource.title: 100% Free & Open Source
opensource.subtitle: Inside My Mind is built in public as a learning project for SaaS architecture. No paid tiers, no monetization. Contribute, fork, or learn from the code.

cta.title: Stop planning. Start today.
cta.subtitle: 66 days. 3 AI agents. Zero excuses. 100% free.

footer.copy: © 2026 Inside My Mind. Built with 🧠 and discipline.

login.subtitle: Welcome back. Let's keep the streak alive.
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Start your 66-day transformation today.
register.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
